brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is feedback-controlled quantum many-body dynamics — iterated short-time quantum evolution plus classical optimization projecting onto a low-entanglement variational manifold to stabilize regular (KAM-like) trajectories in a mixed phase space. Paper B's machinery is a continuum advection-diffusion bio-heat PDE (the Wulff model) with directional blood-enthalpy transport in the heat flux, characterized by a Peclet number balancing advection against thermal diffusion. These are unrelated mechanisms — nonlinear variational chaos control versus a linear transport PDE — with no role-for-role correspondence beyond the generic label of 'nonequilibrium dynamics'.
